_working_directory_comment: Leave null for portable mode — larry_paths.BASE_DIR is used (the dir containing agent_v2.py). Set to an absolute path only to override.

gpu_gaming._comment: When gaming_mode is true, model_router clamps Ollama num_gpu (GPU transformer-layer offload) to gaming_num_gpu so the RTX 4060's VRAM + compute stay free for games; remaining layers run on the 64GB DDR5 via CPU. gaming_num_gpu=16 is ~half of dolphin3:8b's 32 layers (~50% GPU, ~2.5-3GB VRAM). Lower = more game headroom but slower tokens. Toggle live with no restart: set gaming_mode false for full-speed inference.

ollama._default_model_comment: dolphin3:8b (~4.9GB, Dolphin 3 on Llama-3.1-8B) — uncensored, strong tool/function calling, fits fully on the RTX 4060 8GB with room for KV cache. keep_alive 30m holds it warm in VRAM. Heavy models remain available via the profile tiers below.
ollama._max_loaded_models_comment: How many models Ollama keeps resident at once. 3+ lets the chat LLM, the embedding model (nomic-embed-text), and a chunking/reranking model stay warm together so RAG does not evict the chat model and reload on every request. Small embed models (~0.3-0.7GB) coexist with one big chat model on 8GB VRAM; Ollama spills overflow to CPU/DDR5. Raise if you add more concurrent models.
ollama._mcp_host_model_comment: Model that drives the agentic MCP tool loop (/mcprun, the background MCP host). qwen3:8b is fast + fully GPU-offloaded with verified tool calling. Set to 'LocalLarry-Agentic' for the heavier uncensored 35B (slower on 8GB). Env LARRY_MCP_HOST_MODEL overrides this.

fullstack._comment: Controls launchers/start_fullstack.py (the 'Larry Full Stack' dashboard service + system launcher).
fullstack._fast_tool_modelfile_comment: Leave empty to `ollama pull` fast_tool_model. Set to e.g. 'ollama_modelfiles/Modelfile.Larry-Fast-9b' to `ollama create` a custom model instead.
